titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Science and Engineering Association Records
Yale Science and Engineering Association Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday November 14, 2020 at 08:16

did.unittitle: Yale Science and Engineering Association records
did.abstract: The material consists of meeting minutes, subject files and correspondence maintained by Hugo Beit (1953E), who served as secretary from 1963 to 2003.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 23-G (YRG 23-G), Records of School of Engineering alumni and support organizations.).

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The materials were a gift of Hugo Beit, 2008.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright for materials authored or otherwise produced as official business of Yale University is retained by Yale University. Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Science and Engineering Association Records (RU 1089). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Yale Engineering Association, an alumni organization, was founded in 1914 to encourage and recognize excellence and accomplishment in members of the Yale engineering community. In 1971 it expanded to include all the sciences, becoming the Yale Science and Engineering Association (YSEA).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The material consists of meeting minutes, subject files and correspondence maintained by Hugo Beit (1953E), who served as secretary from 1963 to 2003.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

did.unittitle: Summary of the first 25 years of YEA (Yale Engineering Association)
Photos of Ken and Marjorie Lutz
Organization charts and Executive Board directories
Minutes, constitution and by-laws, treasurer's reports, yearly budget, etc.
